About.metaTitle: About Albident — dental clinic in Şişli, Istanbul
About.metaDescription: Albident dental clinic in Şişli (Istanbul): doctors with international qualifications, warranties, patient reviews.

hero.heading: About Albident
hero.intro: A mid-range general dental clinic in Şişli, Istanbul. We see adult patients in three languages — Turkish, Russian, and English.

clinic.heading: Our clinic
clinic.body:
We work on a "diagnose first, treat second" principle. Before any complex procedure, we take a 3D jaw scan, discuss the treatment plan and the final cost with the patient before starting. No surprises at the end.

Clinic equipment — modern microscope for endodontics, digital implant planning, laser gum treatment. We use Straumann, Nobel Biocare, E.max, Invisalign materials — trusted brands with a long track record.

The team — doctors with degrees from Turkey, Switzerland, and Russia, with ongoing professional development. Half of our patients are dental tourists; for them, we plan the treatment schedule around their travel dates and discuss everything on WhatsApp before they arrive.

warranties.heading: Warranties
warranties.intro: We give warranties on all major types of work. If a problem related to our treatment arises during the warranty period, we redo it without additional charge. For dental tourists, the same conditions apply: the warranty remains valid wherever you travel.
warranties.footnote: The warranty is valid subject to keeping the check-up schedule (every 6 months) and basic hygiene routines. We discuss the details at the initial consultation.
